title: Captain Sabertooth and the Magic Diamond
original_title: Kaptein Sabeltann og den Magiske Diamant
overview: Captain Sabertooth and his crew are up against a sunburnt vampire, a manipulating queen, a violent monkey army and two young pirates while on the hunt for the magical diamond.
